mapper.sql: and ( order_id is null or id in ( select max(n2.id) from notice n2 where n2.is_deleted = 0 and n2.order_id is not null group by n2.order_id ) )
mapper.select:
select id, type, title, content, is_read as isRead, order_id as orderId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from notice where is_deleted = 0
order by create_time desc

select id, type, title, content, is_read as isRead, order_id as orderId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from notice where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select count(1) from notice where is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update notice set is_read = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update notice set is_read = 1 where is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0
update notice set is_deleted = 1 where order_id = #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into notice ( type, title, content, is_read, order_id, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{orderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
